hero.title: How can we help you today?
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your loan, make payments, or get support — all in one place.

items.title: Payments
items.desc: Pay your EMI online, via NEFT/RTGS, or set up auto-debit for hassle-free repayment.

items.title: Grievance Redressal
items.desc: Submit a complaint, track its status, and escalate if needed. We resolve in 30 days.

items.title: Calculators
items.desc: Estimate your EMI, check eligibility, or calculate foreclosure amounts before you call.

items.title: Apply Now
items.desc: Start a new loan application in minutes. AI pre-qualification with no credit score impact.
